examples: She speaks with a soft West Country burr.
The House ended up choosing Thomas Jefferson over Aaron Burr.
The winter's frost must rend the burr of the nut before the fruit is seen.
Later that morning, Miss Wells-Burr's body was discovered in the burnt out remains of her car.
Jon Burr, a 34-year-old personal trainer, was walking 5 miles home to Charlestown through Kenmore Square.
